title: Clinical Trial Protocol Extraction: Convert PDFs to Structured Excel Data
metaTitle: Clinical Trial Protocol Extraction - PDF to Excel Automation
metaDescription: Extract key data from clinical trial protocols, consent forms, and research docs. Convert PDF protocols to structured Excel spreadsheets with AI.
h1: Clinical Trial Protocol Extraction: Automate Data Extraction from Research Documents

hero.headline: Extract Clinical Trial Data from PDF Protocols in Minutes
hero.subheadline: Convert clinical trial protocols, consent forms, and research documentation into structured Excel spreadsheets with AI-powered field extraction

summary: Clinical trial protocol extraction involves converting PDF research documents into structured data formats for analysis and compliance tracking. This process extracts key information like study objectives, inclusion criteria, dosing schedules, and endpoint measurements from protocols, consent forms, and regulatory submissions.
whoItsFor: Clinical research organizations managing multiple trial protocols
Research coordinators tracking study parameters across trials
whenThisIsRelevant: Processing new protocol amendments for database updates
Extracting endpoint data for meta-analysis preparations
Converting legacy PDF protocols to searchable databases
expectedOutputs: Excel files with protocol parameters in separate columns
CSV datasets ready for clinical data management systems
commonChallenges: Manual transcription errors in critical dosing information
Time-consuming extraction from multi-hundred page protocols
Inconsistent formatting across different study sponsors
Version control issues when protocols are amended
howItWorksSteps: Upload your clinical trial protocol PDFs or scanned documents
Select specific fields like primary endpoints, inclusion criteria, or visit schedules
AI extracts the data points and structures them into Excel columns
Download the organized spreadsheet for your clinical database or analysis
whyPdfExcelAiFits: Custom field selection lets you target specific protocol sections like endpoints or eligibility criteria
Batch processing handles multiple protocols simultaneously for efficiency
OCR capabilities work with scanned legacy documents from older trials
99%+ accuracy on clear digital protocols reduces transcription errors
limitations: Complex nested tables in protocol schedules may require manual review
Handwritten annotations on consent forms have limited recognition accuracy
Heavily redacted documents may have incomplete field extraction

faq.question: Can this extract specific endpoints from clinical trial protocols?
faq.answer: Yes, you can customize field selection to target primary endpoints, secondary outcomes, safety parameters, and other specific protocol elements you need extracted.

faq.question: Does it work with scanned PDF protocols from older studies?
faq.answer: Yes, the OCR functionality can process scanned PDF documents and images, though accuracy depends on the scan quality and document clarity.

faq.question: How accurate is the extraction for dosing schedules and visit timelines?
faq.answer: Accuracy is 99%+ on clear digital documents, but complex nested tables in protocol schedules may need manual verification for critical dosing information.

faq.question: Can I process multiple protocols from different sponsors simultaneously?
faq.answer: Yes, batch processing allows you to upload multiple protocol documents at once, with each protocol's data appearing as a separate row in your output spreadsheet.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and automatically deleted after processing
Pay-as-you-go pricing with free trial available
No permanent document storage for compliance
Pipeline automation for recurring protocol processing workflows
exampleUseCases: CRO extracting inclusion criteria from 50+ protocols for feasibility analysis
Pharma company converting legacy trial documents to searchable database format
Research coordinator building endpoint comparison tables across similar studies
Regulatory affairs team processing protocol amendments for submission tracking
